authentication.note: No authentication needed for the free tool. A Bearer API key (or ?token= query param), issued from the Docracy Dashboard, unlocks the paid tool.

tools.name: check_status
tools.description: Look up the status of a Docracy signing chain from a sign or status link.

tools.name: find_documents
tools.description: Search your own Docracy documents by title or a signer's name/email/company.
